name: falsifylab-alpha-mcp
summary: MCP data layer for AI-assisted market research: 9 finance tools for AI agents covering DeFi yield, Hyperliquid vaults, SEC Form 4 insider clusters, 8-K material filings, macro tape, US spot ETF flows, airdrop farms, Polymarket whales, plus confluence_today cross-source signal alignment. Free tier requires no signup. Pro $19/mo for real-time, 100 results, 90-day history.
